steps.title: Spot the contextual signal
steps.content: The blank links damage to its source: Soviet censors. The novel was harmed by the censors, so the blank needs a phrase meaning 'caused by.'

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Wrought by means brought about or caused by — exactly damage inflicted by censors. 'Bestowed on' and 'allocated to' would mean given to censors, and 'concealed from' means hidden from, none of which fit.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
